title: Individual Statistics by Tax Filing Method (ISTFM) - Canada.ca
content:
## Individual Statistics by Tax Filing Method (ISTFM)
The Individual Statistics by Tax Filing Method (ISTFM) tables present statistics on the filing method of taxfilers grouped by certain demographic and economic characteristics.
- 2015 tax year - Revised
- 2014 tax year - Revised
